title: Deon Cross
extract:
Deon Cross (born 30 July 1996) is a rugby league footballer who plays as a centre or winger for St Helens in the Super League.
He previously played for the Rochdale Hornets, Barrow Raiders and the Widnes Vikings in the Championship, featuring as a winger earlier in his career.
he scored on his home debut for St. Helens in a 40-0 victory over the Catalan Dragons. He most recently scored the opening try in the derby match vs Wigan where the Saints lost 4-18
